rationale: 0 entity records of esophageal type in note_entities_procedures corpus; anatomical references only
expected_missingness_behavior: Always FALSE — not confirmed negative; represents absence of NLP evidence
notes: Do not interpret FALSE as confirmed-negative. Add Methods caveat.

rationale: NLP entity type not in current vocabulary; requires V2 extractor deployment to MotherDuck
notes: Extractor exists at notes_extraction/extract_operative_v2.py but output not materialized.

rationale: NLP entity type not in current vocabulary — same gap as berry_ligament_flag
notes: Requires intraoperative_decision entity type in NLP vocab.

rationale: EBL NLP entity not in note_entities_procedures; structured ebl_ml from operative_details has ~1% coverage
notes: Source-limited at both structured and NLP layers.

rationale: Numeric entity extraction not implemented for parathyroid identification count; only flag available
expected_missingness_behavior: NULL for all patients; boolean parathyroid_autograft_flag has 40/9371 coverage
notes: Use parathyroid_autograft_flag (40 confirmed) instead.

rationale: Monitoring mentioned in 1701/9371 operative notes but may include mention-of-risk language not confirmed-monitoring
expected_missingness_behavior: 1701 TRUE; but same H&P boilerplate contamination risk as complication entities
notes: Treat as likely-monitoring; same precision concern as RLN injury NLP prior to refinement.

rationale: TSH/PTH/Ca lab dates are NLP-extracted or note-anchored — no structured specimen_collect_dt outside thyroglobulin table
notes: Use thyroglobulin (99.5%) and anti-Tg (97.7%) for precise TTE analysis. Use PTH/Ca for broad windowing only.

rationale: TSH measurements not in any structured lab feed; no thyroglobulin_labs-equivalent for TSH exists in current data
notes: Requires institutional lab extract before this variable is analysis-grade.

rationale: Free T4 not in any structured lab table
notes: Requires institutional lab extract.

rationale: Vitamin D not in any structured lab table
notes: Requires institutional lab extract.

rationale: Calcitonin not in any structured lab table; MTC-specific variable
notes: Critical for MTC cohort analyses — requires lab extract.

rationale: 88.8% of recurrence flags come from recurrence_risk_features_mv boolean without day-level date; no structured recurrence registry
notes: CONDITIONALLY allowed; do not use for TTE analysis on the 88.8% without date. Use structured boolean recurrence_flag for count-based analyses.

rationale: Nuclear medicine reports absent from clinical_notes_long corpus; dose extracted from endocrine/DC notes only; 41% coverage after all backfill
expected_missingness_behavior: 41% fill rate post-backfill (761/1857 episodes); capped without institutional nuc-med data
notes: Use presence/absence as primary variable; dose as secondary with missingness discussion in Methods.

rationale: RAI receipt assertion from NLP notes; not all assertions are confirmed administrations; some are planned or historical
expected_missingness_behavior: 862 patients with any episode; 35 confirmed-with-dose (best tier)
notes: Use rai_assertion_status tiers; 'definite_received' is most reliable subgroup.

rationale: Only 32.5% of cohort has TIRADS score; ACR systematic -1.0 mean mismatch vs radiologist-reported scores
notes: Report coverage fraction in Methods; note systematic ACR vs radiologist discordance.

rationale: Size derived primarily from NLP (h_p + op_note text) and per-nodule structured Excel; not all nodule measurements are the index nodule
notes: Prefer structured Excel source (tirads_reliability=validated); NLP sizes have ±0.5cm uncertainty.

rationale: Only 8 patients have documented vocal_cord_status (paresis/paralysis) with laryngoscopy date in structured complications table
notes: Use refined RLN pipeline counts (extracted_rln_injury_refined_v2) for clinical reporting.

rationale: 441 confirmed BRAF-positive patients; NGS (266) + NLP-confirmed (175); false-positive fix applied 2026-03-12; 55.1% of molecular-tested matches published surgical cohort enrichment
expected_missingness_behavior: 441/10025 molecular-tested (4.4% of surgical cohort); NGS-only 266 for highest-specificity analysis
notes: For highest-specificity analyses use NGS-only source filter (braf_detection_method = 'NGS').

rationale: 316 confirmed RAS-positive patients; NRAS/HRAS/KRAS breakdown available; NLP positivity gate applied
notes: Distinguish RAS_unspecified (31) from typed NRAS/HRAS/KRAS in subgroup analyses.

rationale: 96 TERT-positive patients recovered (was 1 prior to Phase 5); sourced from molecular_test_episode_v2.tert_flag; C228T/C250T sub-typing available for 65%
ETE grading Phase 9: 3642 microscopic (resolved from x-placeholder) + 188 gross + 49 still-ungraded; AJCC8 compliant
notes: x-placeholder resolution rule: x → microscopic (AJCC8: does NOT upstage T1-T2).

rationale: R0=12; R1=3896; R2=25; Rx=35; majority from path_synoptics 'x'=involved (R1)
notes: R0 recovery required op-note NLP; low R0 count expected in malignant cohort with intent-to-cure surgery.

rationale: 87% of vascular invasion remains 'present_ungraded' (path_synoptics 'x' without vessel count); WHO 2022 focal/extensive grading available for only 819/3846 positive patients
notes: Report as present/absent for primary analysis; use WHO grade as exploratory subgroup with limitation note.

rationale: Source-linked structured boolean from recurrence_risk_features_mv; 1986/10871 (18.3%) flagged; multi-source linkage available
expected_missingness_behavior: 18.3% overall; biochemical (168) and structural-confirmed (54) subtypes available

rationale: AJCC 8th Ed stage from thyroid_scoring_py_v1; age-dependent (DTC); 98.6% calculable among eligible
notes: Use thyroid_scoring_py_v1 as single source of truth for staging; do not use raw path_synoptics staging codes.

rationale: ATA 2015 initial risk stratification; 76.0% calculable among analysis-eligible cancer patients
expected_missingness_behavior: 76% calculable; 24% missing ETE or LN inputs required for intermediate/high classification
notes: Report calculability fraction in Methods; sensitivity analysis with complete cases vs imputed.

rationale: MACIS score from thyroid_scoring_py_v1; 37.5% calculable (requires exact tumor size + distant mets)
expected_missingness_behavior: 37.5% calculable in cancer cohort; limited by 65-67% tumor_size missing
notes: Useful for specific publications focused on patient subsets with complete staging data.

rationale: Weight from path_synoptics.weight_total; 35% coverage overall; 34% in goiter cohort
expected_missingness_behavior: Available 4072/11688; 65% missing — imputation required for goiter analyses
notes: MICE imputation provides coverage for statistical modeling; report source fraction.

rationale: operative_details.bmi has ~1.3% coverage (122/9368 rows)
notes: Recommend external linkage if BMI is analytically required.

rationale: Sex from demographics_harmonized_v2; 93.2% coverage (10873/11673); cross-source harmonization applied
notes: Use LOWER(sex) or demographics_harmonized_v2.sex_final for case-insensitive matching.

rationale: Race from demographics_harmonized_v2; 93.1% coverage; 25+ raw categories normalized to 7 analytic groups
notes: Always use analytic race groups not raw values; see race normalization map.

rationale: Age calculated from DOB+surgery_date; 99.2% coverage after cross-file DOB recovery
expected_missingness_behavior: 88 truly missing (research_id > 9800 range; not in any raw Excel)
notes: 88 missing patients are post-data-freeze additions; reportable as missing in denominator.

rationale: ENE grade: 1250 present_ungraded + 7 indeterminate; path_synoptics uses 'x'/'present' without extent qualifiers
expected_missingness_behavior: 1267 patients with ENE; 98.6% have only synoptic 'x' marker without extent grading
notes: Report as present/absent; sub-grading requires deep free-text path report parsing beyond current scope.

rationale: 10 operative boolean fields (rln_monitoring, parathyroid_autograft, gross_ete, local_invasion, tracheal, esophageal, strap_muscle, reoperative, drain, parathyroid_resection) mean UNKNOWN/NOT_PARSED when FALSE — not confirmed-negative
expected_missingness_behavior: FALSE = absence of NLP evidence; NOT confirmed-negative for all fields except central_neck_dissected and lateral_neck_dissected (those are structurally validated)
notes: Always interpret with UNKNOWN semantics for FALSE values. Never report operational absence as clinical absence without independent validation.

rationale: 6801 lab events lack a date despite non-NULL values — TSH/PTH/Ca/VitD NLP extractions have no specimen_collect_dt or nearby entity_date
expected_missingness_behavior: 6801 warnings in val_provenance_traceability; affect all non-Tg analytes
notes: Use lab_date_status to filter to events where date is trustworthy; classify untrustworthy dates as 'approximate-temporal' in Methods.
